mapper.select:
SELECT A.USR_CD , A.LOGIN_ID , A.USR_NM , A.EML , F_COM_DECRYPT(A.PHONE_NO, #{encryptKey}) AS PHONE_NO , A.GNDR , CASE A.GNDR WHEN 'M' THEN '남자' WHEN 'F' THEN '여자' ELSE '' END AS GNDR_NM , A.USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_LOGIN_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS LAST_LOGIN_DTM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_USR A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND A.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND (A.USR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC

SELECT A.USR_CD , A.LOGIN_ID , A.USR_NM , A.EML , F_COM_DECRYPT(A.PHONE_NO, #{encryptKey}) AS PHONE_NO , A.GNDR , A.BRTH_DT , A.USE_YN , A.LOGIN_ERR_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_LOGIN_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS LAST_LOGIN_DTM , A.LOGIN_LIMIT_START_DTM , A.WTHD_EXE_DTM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS CRE_DTM , DATE_FORMAT(A.UPD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DTM FROM TB_USR A WHERE A.USR_CD = #{usrCd} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USR SET LOGIN_PWD = F_COM_ENCRYPT(#{newPassword}, #{encryptKey}) , LOGIN_ERR_CNT = '0' , LOGIN_LIMIT_START_DTM = NULL , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE USR_CD = #{usrCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE TB_USR SET LOGIN_PWD = F_COM_ENCRYPT(#{newPwd}, #{encryptKey}) , UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE USR_CD = #{usrCd} AND LOGIN_PWD = F_COM_ENCRYPT(#{currentPwd}, #{encryptKey}) AND DEL_YN = 'N'
